data_source: Alpaca real market data via qfa backtest (no --data-csv; no CSV fixtures)
divergent_child_idea: AR-009-D1: Mega-cap intraday reversal after abnormal closing-auction volume imbalance, testing a liquidity-provision driver instead of continuation from daily price pressure.

qfa.command: qfa backtest run models/volume-price-pressure-megacap-v1/model.py --symbols AAPL,MSFT,NVDA,AMZN,META,GOOGL,TSLA --start 2024-01-01 --end 2025-12-31 --timeframe 1Day --initial-cash 100000 --db models/volume-price-pressure-megacap-v1/evaluations/qfa_realdata.sqlite (credentials sourced from alpaca.env; CSV input omitted)
qfa.db_retention_note: SQLite DB artifact removed before commit per alpha-model-management large artifact policy; compact JSON/Markdown summaries retained.

refinement_child_idea: AR-009-R1: Add market-regime and trend-quality filters plus parameter stability sweep over return_window=[1,3,5] and volume_z_min=[1.0,2.0] to reduce drawdowns and turnover sensitivity.
suggested_decision: reject_or_research_watchlist_only; negative pre-cost Sharpe and severe drawdown fail AR-009 acceptance threshold
warnings: Costs/slippage were not applied because qfa backtest CLI exposes no cost/slippage parameter; reported metrics are pre-cost.
SQLite artifact evaluations/qfa_realdata.sqlite was created under the model folder and should be removed by controller before commit if desired.
